# WP Appointments Developer Documentation

> Build addons, integrate with the REST API, and extend WP Appointments — the next-gen appointment scheduling plugin for WordPress.

## Getting Started

- [Overview](https://docs.wpappointments.com/developers/): Developer documentation overview
- [Quick Start](https://docs.wpappointments.com/developers/getting-started/): Set up your dev environment and build your first addon
- [Architecture](https://docs.wpappointments.com/developers/architecture/): Plugin architecture, PHP namespaces, frontend stack

## Hooks Reference

- [Actions](https://docs.wpappointments.com/developers/hooks/actions/): WordPress action hooks for extending WP Appointments
- [Filters](https://docs.wpappointments.com/developers/hooks/filters/): WordPress filter hooks for modifying behavior

## REST API

- [Overview](https://docs.wpappointments.com/developers/rest-api/): REST API namespace `/wpappointments/v1/`
- [Appointments](https://docs.wpappointments.com/developers/rest-api/appointments/): CRUD endpoints for appointments
- [Bookables](https://docs.wpappointments.com/developers/rest-api/bookables/): Bookable entity endpoints
- [Bookable Types](https://docs.wpappointments.com/developers/rest-api/bookable-types/): Bookable type registry endpoints
- [Availability](https://docs.wpappointments.com/developers/rest-api/availability/): Calendar and month availability
- [Customers](https://docs.wpappointments.com/developers/rest-api/customers/): Customer CRUD endpoints
- [Variants](https://docs.wpappointments.com/developers/rest-api/variants/): Bookable variant endpoints
- [Settings](https://docs.wpappointments.com/developers/rest-api/settings/): Plugin settings endpoints

## Addon Development

- [Overview](https://docs.wpappointments.com/developers/addons/): How the addon system works
- [PHP Setup](https://docs.wpappointments.com/developers/addons/php-setup/): Register PHP addon with hooks and filters
- [JS Setup](https://docs.wpappointments.com/developers/addons/js-setup/): Frontend integration with `@wordpress/data` stores
- [Custom Bookable Type](https://docs.wpappointments.com/developers/addons/bookable-type/): Register a new bookable type

## Packages

- [@wpappointments/components](https://docs.wpappointments.com/packages/components/): UI components for addon admin pages
- [@wpappointments/data](https://docs.wpappointments.com/packages/data/): Hooks, API client, and data store utilities
